backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that manages user profiles, poetry, duas, and songs with CRUD operations, access control via mixins, and maintenance/user-blocking features.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Dard-e-munasif', linking the app logo favicon, and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Login, Mix, Poetry, Dua, Songs, and Admin pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: An admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with the ability to delete items after a confirmation dialog, with loading skeletons and refresh support.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: An admin form component for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, showing upload progress and resetting on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: An admin form component for uploading new poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, showing upload progress and resetting fields on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: A form component for admins to upload songs with title, artist, and audio file fields, showing upload progress and using the createSong mutation to submit data.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: An admin panel component for managing users (search, block/unblock) and toggling app-wide maintenance mode, with confirmation dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, AudioContext focus management, MediaSession integration, forced unmuted/full-volume enforcement, and a permission-denied guard UI.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay shown to blocked users, displaying a suspension message and a WhatsApp deep-link button to contact the admin.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Card component for a single Dua post featuring a time-ago label, optimistic like button, share via Web Share API, copy-to-clipboard, audio download, and a full-screen modal on click.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: A full-screen modal component for displaying Poetry or Dua posts, supporting image display, audio playback, like count, keyboard (Escape) dismissal, scroll locking, and history tracking.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A slide-out hamburger menu panel that shows browsing history and downloaded audio entries, with play/pause and delete controls for downloads.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout wrapper that handles authentication checks, ban/maintenance status via the backend actor, redirects unauthenticated users to login, and renders the navigation bar with theme toggle and hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: A full-screen overlay component displayed when the app is under maintenance, showing an animated wrench icon and a message from the developer.
A full-screen music player modal that auto-plays the selected song, displays album art, and provides play/pause and seek controls using the audio playback hook.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard component that protects admin content, persisting the authenticated session in sessionStorage for the duration of the browser session.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a poetry post with like, download, share, and copy actions, plus a full-screen modal view and auto-refreshing timestamp.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a song post with inline play/pause, like, share, and copy actions, plus a now-playing modal and auto-refreshing timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: A hook managing global singleton audio playback state including play/pause/seek, wake lock, MediaSession metadata, and audio permission checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: A hook that manages offline audio downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: A hook that tracks and persists playback history entries in IndexedDB, providing add and refresh operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD and like operations on Poetry, Dua, Songs, and User records, each using the backend actor and invalidating relevant query caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Stub hook that previously managed a Web Audio filter chain; all methods are now no-ops since audio plays directly via HTMLAudioElement to fix silent audio issues.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and typography classes for Urdu/Nastaliq and poetry content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-guarded admin panel with tabbed sections for uploading Poetry/Dua/Song content, managing existing content, and controlling users via dedicated sub-components.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all Dua entries in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step login page where users enter a name and select a server; generates a stable device fingerprint, registers the user via mutation, and stores credentials in localStorage before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Combined feed page that merges Poetry, Dua, and Song content into a chronologically sorted list with category filter tabs, a user identity card showing the unique code, and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: React page that fetches and displays all poetry posts in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty state message.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: React page that fetches and displays all songs in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error handling with retry, and an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Utility module that initializes and manages an IndexedDB database with two stores—history (metadata, capped at 50 entries) and downloads (audio Blobs)—exposing CRUD helpers for each.
frontend/src/utils/timeAgo.ts: Utility function that converts an Internet Computer nanosecond timestamp (bigint) into a human-readable relative time string (e.g., '3 days ago').
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helpers to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, Urdu/Latin font families, accordion animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 69) documenting the app's architecture, existing features, known bugs (backend auth errors, audio issues, loading delays), and the latest requested features for the 'Dard-e-munasif' multimedia content app.
